stories.name: i18n-strings
stories.title: i18n strings for cancel pending invitation feature
stories.description: Add all EN and DE translation keys required by the cancel-pending-invitation feature to app/src/lib/i18n.ts. No UI or logic changes. Provides the i18n foundation all downstream stories depend on.

includes: app/src/lib/i18n.ts — add cancelInviteButton, cancelInviteTitle, cancelInviteBody, cancelInviteConfirm, cancelInviteSuccess, cancelInviteError, cancelInviteRaceNotice, cancelledByAnnouncement to Copy type and both en/de objects
app/tests/unit/ — vitest assertions for all 8 new keys in both languages, mirroring manageInviteLinksModal.test.ts:103-121

stories.name: marmot-context-cancel-action
stories.title: MarmotContext cancelPendingInvitation and isPendingMember actions
stories.description: Add isPendingMember and cancelPendingInvitation to MarmotContextValue. The cancel action re-checks pending status, calls mlsGroup.commit with the Remove + UpdateMetadata extra proposals in a single call, sends the kind-9 chat announcement, and calls markBackupDirty + reloadGroups. Unit-tested with a mocked marmot-ts client.

includes: app/src/context/MarmotContext.tsx — add isPendingMember(groupId, pubkey): Promise<boolean> and cancelPendingInvitation(groupId, pubkey): Promise<{ok:boolean; error?:string; raceDetected?:boolean}>
app/tests/unit/marmot/ — unit tests covering happy path, commit-throws, already-not-a-member, race-guard; mock pattern from epochResolver.test.ts

introduces_mocks.description: marmot-ts mlsGroup.commit and Proposals.proposeRemoveUser mocked in unit tests

stories.name: invite-cancelled-announcement
stories.title: InviteCancelledChatAnnouncement component and GroupChat dispatch
stories.description: Add InviteCancelledChatAnnouncement component mirroring PollChatAnnouncement. Extend StructuredContent union, parseStructured, and the GroupChat render switch to handle the invite_cancelled message type. Unit-test parseStructured for the new branch.

includes: app/src/components/GroupChat.tsx — extend StructuredContent union, parseStructured, and render switch at lines 362-389
app/tests/unit/ — parseStructured unit test for invite_cancelled branch

stories.name: member-list-cancel-ui
stories.title: MemberList Cancel button, confirmation modal, and groups.tsx wiring
stories.description: Add onCancelInvite prop to MemberList/MemberListItem with a gated inline Cancel button. Add a Chakra confirmation modal. Wire the cancel action from groups.tsx GroupDetailView using cancelPendingInvitation from context, showing appropriate toasts on success, race-notice, and error paths.

includes: app/src/components/MemberList.tsx — add onCancelInvite?: (pubkey: string) => Promise<void> prop; render cancel-invite-{pk.slice(0,8)} button gated on isPending && !isYou && onCancelInvite
app/src/components/MemberList.tsx — Chakra Modal confirmation with cancelInviteTitle, cancelInviteBody, cancelInviteConfirm strings
app/src/pages/groups.tsx — wire onCancelInvite in GroupDetailView calling cancelPendingInvitation; show success/race/error toasts

stories.name: e2e-cancel-pending
stories.title: E2E test for cancel pending invitation flow
stories.description: Playwright serial test: USER_A creates a group, invites USER_B's npub (USER_B is a phantom — KeyPackage on relay, browser never booted), USER_A cancels the pending invite via the Cancel button, asserts USER_B disappears from member list, cancellation chat row appears, and USER_A can still send a chat message.

includes: app/tests/e2e/groups-cancel-pending.spec.ts — new file, test.describe.serial(), two-context pattern from groups-forward-secrecy.spec.ts:95-114 but USER_B context never opened
No production code changes; no new IDB databases; clearAppState not modified
excludes: USER_B browser context beyond KeyPackage publishing

dependency_notes: S1 (i18n) is a prerequisite for S4 (UI) and S5 (E2E) which reference the i18n keys. S2 (MarmotContext) is a prerequisite for S4 (UI wiring) and S5 (E2E). S3 (announcement component) is a prerequisite for S5 (E2E assertion on chat row). S4 and S3 are independent of each other. Total order: S1 → S2 → S3 → S4 → S5.
